Persistence._comment: Replay-guard state store. 'InMemory' (default) for local dev/tests. Switch to 'SqlServer'/'Npgsql' in Program.cs once a real DBMS is wired up (also requires a connection string and EF Core migrations).

KeyService._comment: Placeholder master-key lookup service contract: GET {BaseUrl}/tags/{uid}/key -> { masterKeyBase64 }. Adjust HttpTagKeyProvider once the real contract is known. Do NOT point this at a service without transport security in production.

MacMessagePolicy._comment: 'EmptyMessage' (default, AN12196 Table 4: SDMMACInputOffset == SDMMACOffset) - final CMAC message is empty. 'MirroredData' (AN12196 Table 5: SDMMACInputOffset != SDMMACOffset) - final CMAC message is the literal bytes mirrored between the two offsets (e.g. a static 'serial' value in the URL template, or a full query string up to and including 'mac='). Confirmed against a real captured tag read when combined with CounterCodec 'NumericLittleEndian' below.

CounterCodec._comment: 'LiteralHex' (default) decodes 'ctr' hex text directly to bytes in written order - matches NXP's official AN12196 Table 4 vector. 'NumericLittleEndian' parses 'ctr' as a number and re-encodes little-endian/LSB-first before use in SV2 - confirmed correct for at least one real captured tag read (see ICounterCodec/NumericLittleEndianCounterCodec remarks).
